description_long: This object depicts a male construction worker standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a bright green work uniform with reflective silver stripes on the arms, chest, waist, and legs, providing high visibility. The figure wears a yellow safety helmet and sturdy black work boots, both standard for construction environments. The back of the uniform is marked with the letters 'SDFD', suggesting affiliation with a specific organization or department. The uniform appears to be a one-piece coverall, designed for durability and protection. The overall appearance is clean and professional, suitable for urban construction or emergency response scenarios.
description: A male construction worker in a green reflective coverall, yellow safety helmet, and black work boots, marked 'SDFD' on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green coverall, reflective stripes, yellow helmet, and black boots with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, uniform, and boots, with arm extended outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'SDFD' marking on the back, reflective stripes, and the back of the helmet and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the helmet, uniform, and boots, with arm extended outward.
